examples: One unit of alcohol is equal to half a pint of beer.
Give Roger another pint, Imogen, and I'll have the same again.
A pint and a half of beer can produce the effect and in men it may last 24 hours.
The Ship Inn is the place if you want a pint with the locals.
For a rich, flavourful pint, try Wedge's Belgian Abbey Ale, a bit nutty with some caramel hints.
